case_title: PETER J GOTTSCHALK VS. VIKAS GUPTA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOTTSCHALK, PETER J DBA PETER'S REPAIR SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUPTA, VIKAS $247.98 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $342.98 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
